docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'python - <<"PY"
import json
import pymysql

site_cfg_path = "/home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/frontend/site_config.json"
with open(site_cfg_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    cfg = json.load(f)

db_host = cfg["db_host"]
db_port = int(cfg.get("db_port", 3306))
db_name = cfg["db_name"]
db_user = cfg["db_user"]
db_password = cfg["db_password"]

root_user = "erpnext"
root_password = "AtlasLakesAws123!"

conn = pymysql.connect(host=db_host, port=db_port, user=root_user, password=root_password, autocommit=True)
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute(f"CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS `{db_name}` CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci")
cur.execute(f"CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS `{db_user}`@'%' IDENTIFIED BY %s", (db_password,))
cur.execute(f"ALTER USER `{db_user}`@'%' IDENTIFIED BY %s", (db_password,))
cur.execute(f"GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON `{db_name}`.* TO `{db_user}`@'%'")
cur.execute("FLUSH PRIVILEGES")
cur.close()
conn.close()
print("DB grants repaired for frontend site user")
PY'
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'bench --site frontend migrate'
